_clock_note: every pipeline stage carries at most one 32x32 multiply level; 10 ns targets ~100 MHz on sky130 (a 32x32 signed multiplier alone is ~6-8 ns in sky130_fd_sc_hd), which scales to multi-GHz territory on modern 4/5nm nodes
_klayout_note: npc.2 around tap rows is a known KLayout deck false positive on this PDK; magic DRC remains the signoff gate
